sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after clicking right yellow shape
before = last_transition.before_frame
after = last_transition.after_frame

b_nodes = before.segmentation['nodes']
a_nodes = after.segmentation['nodes']

diffs = []
for i in range(min(len(b_nodes), len(a_nodes))):
    bn, an = b_nodes[i], a_nodes[i]
    if bn != an and i not in [0, 29]:
        diffs.append((i, bn['color'], bn['boundary'], an['color'], an['boundary']))

print(f"Changed nodes (excl. 0, 29): {diffs}")

# Check yellow bar
for n in a_nodes:
    if n['id'] in [16, 17]:
        print(f"Node {n['id']}: color={n['color']}, boundary={n['boundary']}, pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Also check green container
for n in a_nodes:
    if n['id'] in [2, 4]:
        print(f"Node {n['id']}: color={n['color']}, boundary={n['boundary']}, pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
